name: Two Heart shower gel
description: A romantically scented shower gel shaped around the Valentine's season, delivering soft floral rose notes to leave skin feeling cleansed and sweetly fragranced.
archive_note: First released as part of Lush's 2019 Valentine's collection alongside the Peachy bath bomb; the scent is '29 High Street', designed to replicate the signature smell of a Lush store
nostalgia_angle: A cult favourite from Lush's cheeky 2019 Valentine's line, the Aubergine bath bomb became instantly iconic for its phallic design and its uncanny recreation of that beloved Lush shop floor smell
throwback_reference: Companion to the Peachy bath bomb from the 2019 Valentine's line; shares the 29 High Street scent with other products in that range
